actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour mapping verified: Cube_salle3 (1) is a PrefabInstance (id: 1131040470) with Rigidbody (Has_Rigidbody: True) and BoxCollider id 1659405682678754060. It has MonoBehaviour id 5374773463603666079 using script guid 2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006 (class 'SnapToTrigger'). Start() will auto-bind XRGrabInteractable and XRGeneralGrabTransformer; Update() rotates only when isSnapped is true, which is set by public Snap(Vector3). Since the test harness only supports invoking no-parameter methods, we move the object to simulate placement while awaiting external triggers.

To fully cover SnapToTrigger.Update rotation branch, the public Snap(Vector3 trigger_pos) must be invoked with a Vector3. However, method triggering in this framework supports only no-parameter calls. Provide either: (a) an EventTrigger or UnityEvent hook that calls Snap with a Vector3, (b) the trigger position to snap to and a wrapper no-arg method, or (c) permission to call parameterized methods. Until then, this Trigger merely validates component availability and collider-based interaction eligibility.

Without one of these, we can only verify component presence and collider-based eligibility.

actionUnits.condition: Cube_salle1 is a PrefabInstance (id: 816818218) under 'Room 1' and has Has_Rigidbody=True with a non-trigger BoxCollider (id: 1659405682678754060). Its tag is set to 'Objet1' via prefab modification. It has a MonoBehaviour (id: 5374773463603666079) whose m_Script guid '2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006' corresponds exactly to the provided SnapToTrigger script (no serialized fields in scene, matching the script). The door trigger to enter is 'collider_porte' (PrefabInstance id: 86838640), which has a trigger BoxCollider (id: 6650539076773276978, m_IsTrigger=1) and a MonoBehaviour (id: 8870310304005890639) whose m_Script guid '5f8d06fe579502c4496842932d0afead' corresponds exactly to the provided DoorOpenScript. In scene, DoorOpenScript.myDoor is assigned to Animator fileID 1075516723 and openTrigger=1. Action: move/advance Cube_salle1 so it enters the trigger volume of 'collider_porte'. Expected flow on first entry: DoorOpenScript.OnTriggerEnter finds SnapToTrigger on Cube_salle1 and, because tag == 'Objet1' and openTrigger==true, calls SnapToTrigger.Snap(transform.position of collider_porte), plays Animator 1075516723 state 'DoorOpen' (layer 0, time 0.0), deactivates 'collider_porte', and sets openTrigger=false. SnapToTrigger.Snap disables XRGrabInteractable and XRGeneralGrabTransformer on the cube, teleports the cube to trigger_pos + (0,0.4,0), resets rotation to (0,0,0,0), freezes the Rigidbody, and sets isSnapped=true; during the 1.0s trigger duration, SnapToTrigger.Update executes the isSnapped branch, rotating the cube around its local Y axis. Note: After deactivation, subsequent entries will not occur until the object is reactivated.
